slots.name: site
slots.example: Shenzhen Nanshan Zone A equipment room
slots.value_constraint: Must be a concrete site or equipment room name.

slots.name: time_range
slots.value_constraint: Must be a concrete time range.

slots.name: analysis_target
slots.description: Primary systems or targets to analyze.
slots.value_constraint: Must describe one or more concrete analysis targets.

slots.name: expected_output
slots.value_constraint: Must describe the expected output clearly.

slots.name: additional_notes
slots.example: Focus on abnormal nighttime energy consumption.
